videos.title: NEVESPORT 06 - JISERSKA SWIX SKI CLASSICS - S.MART NEWS SAN MARTINO TELEMARK EVENT
Hakkoda Feb 13
videos.description: Another beautiful trip up to Hakkoda.  This time the sun was out making for an extremely beautiful view.  Video is mine, music is by some of my favorite artists, Linkin Park, Offspring, and Green Day.
